title: As a Integrations expert of multi-cloud I wanted to explore the monday.com what is the basic level step I needed to follow

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @tarungupta and welcome to the community!

If you are referring to the apps framework (creating an app with an integration feature), I recommend creating a monday account, investigating and testing how everything works and then checking our documentation about apps.

Let me know if you have any questions!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Tarun Gupta

To start with, I would recommend you to integrate Slack account with monday.com. This will unlock a new level of communication and collaboration ability. Up on integration, you can turn your Slack messages into tasks or updates in monday.com, so that everyone in your team has the most up-to-date information and remains synchronized. In short, this integration offers a centralized workspace for you and your team members to communicate and manage day-to-day tasks.

For integrating your Slack account with monday.com, hire skilled integration experts from us. Being a reputable monday.com consulting company, our integration experts have successfully implemented Slack integration for businesses and teams of all sizes globally.

Please feel free to reach out to us and discuss your requirements.
